item.title: Google VP warns that two types of AI startups may not survive
item.description: As generative AI evolves, a Google VP warns that LLM wrappers and AI aggregators face mounting pressure, with shrinking margins and limited differenti...

item.title: OpenAI debated calling police about suspected Canadian shooter’s chats
item.description: Jesse Van Rootselaar's descriptions of gun violence were flagged by tools that monitor ChatGPT for misuse.

item.title: 7 days until ticket prices rise for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Lowest ticket prices to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 end February 27. Up to $680 off individual passes and up to 30% off group passes. Register before they...

item.title: Best Budget Monitors: I Found 3 Impressive Screens Under $200 (2026)
item.description: You might assume all monitors under $200 are terrible. But after trying some out, I found a few that defy expectations.

item.title: 6 Best Phones With Headphone Jacks (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Headphone jacks are endangered, but they’re not gone. Here are our favorite smartphones that still let you plug and play.
